testcase.name: Login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given user is on Facebook login page........................................passed When user enters valid email and password...................................passed And clicks on login button..................................................passed Then user should be logged in successfully..................................passed

testcase.name: Login with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given user is on Facebook login page........................................passed When user enters invalid email and password.................................passed And clicks on login button..................................................passed Then "Invalid" message is displayed.........................................passed

testcase.name: Register with valid data
testcase.system-out: Given user is on Facebook login page........................................passed When user clicks on Create New Account......................................passed When user enters valid registration details.................................passed And clicks on Sign Up button................................................passed Then user account should be created successfully............................passed

testcase.name: Register with empty fields

failure.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//span[text()='Could not validate your mobile number. Please check the number and try again.']"} (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.54) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.5', java.version: '17.0.16' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [5b1afec67a36442149bdf74809249b28, findElement {value=//span[text()='Could not validate your mobile number. testcase.failure:
